Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Shinichi Nakagawa. Author, maintainer.

  • Pieter A. Arnold. Author.
    co-author of the bayesTLS framework

  • Patrice Pottier. Author.
    co-author of the bayesTLS framework

  • Daniel W. A. Noble. Author.
    senior author of the bayesTLS thermal-load-sensitivity framework

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Nakagawa S, Arnold P, Pottier P, Noble D (2026). freqTLS: Frequentist Inference for Thermal Load Sensitivity Models. R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/itchyshin/freqTLS. 

@Manual{,
  title = {freqTLS: Frequentist Inference for Thermal Load Sensitivity Models},
  author = {Shinichi Nakagawa and Pieter A. Arnold and Patrice Pottier and Daniel W. A. Noble},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.1.0},
  url = {https://github.com/itchyshin/freqTLS},
}

Noble D, Arnold P, Pottier P (2026). bayesTLS: Bayesian Thermal Load Sensitivity Models. R package; the thermal-load-sensitivity framework that freqTLS implements (manuscript in preparation). Bundled datasets retain their individual primary-source licences; snowgum_psii is CC BY-NC 4.0. See the dataset help pages and inst/COPYRIGHTS before reuse. Cite bayesTLS for its method or cached benchmark results, and cite each dataset's primary source when using its data., https://github.com/daniel1noble/bayesTLS. 

@Manual{,
  title = {bayesTLS: Bayesian Thermal Load Sensitivity Models},
  author = {Daniel W. A. Noble and Pieter A. Arnold and Patrice Pottier},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package; the thermal-load-sensitivity framework that freqTLS implements (manuscript in preparation). Bundled datasets retain their individual primary-source licences; snowgum_psii is CC BY-NC 4.0. See the dataset help pages and inst/COPYRIGHTS before reuse. Cite bayesTLS for its method or cached benchmark results, and cite each dataset's primary source when using its data.},
  url = {https://github.com/daniel1noble/bayesTLS},
}

On this page

Developed by Shinichi Nakagawa, Pieter A. Arnold, Patrice Pottier, Daniel W. A. Noble.
